top_signals.title: Massive bonuses for South Korea's chip workers puts central bank on inflation alert
top_signals.summary: Workers from tech industries receive bonus worth millions of won, prompting the Bank of Korea to warn of the upward pressure to inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: India plays ‘whack-a-mole’ with online financial influencers
top_signals.summary: Regulator targets scammers who give stock tips under guise of financial education as ranks of retail investors grow
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: King Charles to publish tax bill for ‘transparency’
top_signals.summary: The King is to become the first head of state to reveal their personal tax bill to help enhance transparency around royal finances. Charles will publish his financial details as his royal household seeks to increase “clarity and accessibility” around the monarchy’s finances by producing a new report on the subject. The decision by the King, [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Japan-South Korea detente persists — but breakthrough remains elusive
top_signals.summary: Tokyo and Seoul have become better at preventing ties from fraying but have been less successful at turning stability into concrete gains.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Schools closed, trains canceled as Europe heat wave set to intensify
top_signals.summary: French forecasters say the current heatwave could end up being as serious as the one in August 2003 that claimed the lives of nearly 15,000 in France.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
